components.button: Generous padding (paddingVertical: 16, paddingHorizontal: 32). Fully rounded corners (borderRadius: 9999) for primary actions. Primary button uses #50B748 background with #FFFFFF text. Must include data-testid and testID.
components.card: Flat surface (#F8FAFC) with 1px border (#E2E8F0) and borderRadius: 16. Minimal shadow. Padding inside MUST be at least 24px.
components.chip: Small pill shape. paddingVertical: 6, paddingHorizontal: 12. Text size 12px uppercase bold. Colors mapped to status (e.g., Available gets #DCFCE7 bg and #50B748 text).
components.input: Large tap targets (minHeight: 56). Solid background (#F1F5F9) instead of borders, or stark 1px solid border. Active state border turns #50B748.
components.header: Sticky/fixed header using React Navigation. Background pure white. Title aligned left with massive typography, avoid generic centering.

screens.Splash: Background #50B748. Massive 'DIU Turf' typography in #FFFFFF. Include DIU logo.
screens.Login: White background. Massive H1 'DIU Turf'. Minimal Google OAuth button. Warning text: 'Exclusive access for @diu.edu.bd students' in text_secondary.
screens.ProfileCompletion: Simple form. Collect Student ID. Massive 'Complete Profile' heading.
screens.HomeDashboard: Displays today's 3 slots. Use 'Bento' style cards for morning, afternoon, evening. Each card shows Time in H2, plus a status Chip.
screens.SlotDetail: Modal or bottom sheet. If Booked, display booker's Name + Student ID in huge text. If Available, show huge 'BOOK SLOT' CTA pinned to bottom.
screens.MyBookings: List view of past/upcoming bookings. Clean separator lines.
screens.AdminDashboard: Dense 'Control Room' grid layout. List all bookings. Toggle buttons to mark slot as 'Maintenance'.

splash_background.description: Aerial view of football field, to be used subtly on splash or login with heavy overlay

turf_placeholder.description: Bird's-eye view of green soccer field with lights, suitable for home screen hero image or headers

students_placeholder.description: Students playing sports on a track, suitable for empty states or profile headers

accessibility_and_testing.test_id_rules: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, list items) MUST have both `testID` (for React Native) and `data-testid` attributes in kebab-case, reflecting their role (e.g., `testID='login-google-button'`).
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for standard text and 3:1 for large text against background.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use React Native StyleSheet for styling. Do NOT use NativeWind.
Implement navigation using React Navigation (bottom tabs for Home, Bookings, Profile).
Use SafeAreaView to prevent notch overlaps.
Implement the UI with strict adherence to the spacing and typography scales defined here.
All components must be .js files, not .tsx files.
Ensure the Google OAuth login strictly mentions or validates the domain '@diu.edu.bd'.
Apply status-based color coding heavily on the Home Dashboard slots (Available, Booked, Maintenance).
